title: chore(deps): update dependency metalsmith-copy to v0.4.0
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [metalsmith-copy](https://github.com/mattwidmann/metalsmith-copy) from `v0.3.0` to `v0.4.0`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.



<details>
<summary>Commits</summary>

#### v0.4.0
-   [`54499da`](https://github.com/mattwidmann/metalsmith-copy/commit/54499da76597aa603542aa48235fec2219390900) Add missing closing parenthesis
-   [`0dbfc44`](https://github.com/mattwidmann/metalsmith-copy/commit/0dbfc44ee0aec65a2d210548353c507890bf6644) Merge pull request #​13 from philippbosch/patch-1
-   [`8c3bce1`](https://github.com/mattwidmann/metalsmith-copy/commit/8c3bce1418bb868ad91a040ee78c0cafa346738e) clean up README, update LICENSE year
-   [`e329ec9`](https://github.com/mattwidmann/metalsmith-copy/commit/e329ec9721c7d640ebc0cccb1f310a136969f303) fix check for required options with falsy values
-   [`1e079d1`](https://github.com/mattwidmann/metalsmith-copy/commit/1e079d18e62d6790c2c1ae38bb7d7a50ab939486) update minimatch and mocha, add package-lock.json
-   [`9a668c0`](https://github.com/mattwidmann/metalsmith-copy/commit/9a668c09fdd5efbc18403632d7b4f4e93713e50b) fix tests for force option
-   [`b35a48d`](https://github.com/mattwidmann/metalsmith-copy/commit/b35a48ddd651707fdf5af8588aad96bd621525a5) document overwrite behavior
-   [`e1874a8`](https://github.com/mattwidmann/metalsmith-copy/commit/e1874a84bee81a0be91704003b82f5e6d4ba6d20) add `ignore` option
-   [`5215daa`](https://github.com/mattwidmann/metalsmith-copy/commit/5215daa6a9cc330405b4966b55a9a7ad4bba502b) Merge branch 'ignore'
-   [`01825a4`](https://github.com/mattwidmann/metalsmith-copy/commit/01825a46ef93c16da1fe6b2a6c64bf4ed56f8b7c) bump version to 0.4.0

</details>
